name: Anti-uPAR CAR T aged intestinal regeneration mouse study
summary: Preclinical study testing therapeutic and prophylactic anti-uPAR CAR T-cell treatment in aged mice with intestinal barrier, regeneration, inflammation, mucosal immune, microbiome, and fitness-related readouts.
model_system: Young and aged mice, with public human intestinal single-cell data used for target-context analysis
